privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for openclinica_env site_specific_crf_versioning task by confirming that the prerequisite site 'Boston Medical Center', event 'Baseline Assessment', and CRF 'Physical Exam' with versions v1.0 and v2.0 are synthetically generated and explicitly injected into the 'DM-TRIAL-2024' study via setup_task.sh PostgreSQL queries. Verified that the expected target parent version (v1.0) and site version (v2.0) exactly match the task description instructions. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because verifier.py is entirely missing from the environment, rendering the task unscorable.
